message:
feat(fcp-e2e): Add subprocess runner and expand E2E test infrastructure

Major expansion of fcp-e2e crate for connector end-to-end testing:

New subprocess.rs module:
- ConnectorProcessRunner for JSONL IPC with connector binaries
- Async spawn/send/recv methods with proper pipe handling
- Graceful shutdown via kill() with wait()

lib.rs enhancements:
- Extended E2eReport with additional test metadata
- New test case builders and assertion helpers
- Improved result aggregation and reporting
- Better integration with fcp-conformance compliance checks

logging.rs:
- Minor formatting improvements

Cargo.toml:
- Updated dependency versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
